allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5002/api/colorinsight/extract-requirements -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer dev-token" -d '{""pdfText"": ""客户：万科集团\\n项目：高端住宅设计\\n需求：1. 希望采用现代简约风格\\n2. 主色调偏好冷色系\\n3. 目标客群为35-45岁城市精英""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5002/api/colorinsight/market-search -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer dev-token" -d '{""requirements"": [{""text"": ""现代简约风格"", ""summaryEn"": ""Modern minimalist style""}]}')
